# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('content')

<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-md-8">
            @if(Session::has('success'))
                <div class="alert alert-success">
                    {{ Session::get('success') }}
                </div>
            @endif
            <div class="card">
                <div class="card-header">Comments</div>

                <div class="card-body">
                    @if ($comments->count())
                        @foreach ($comments as $comment)
                            <div class="media">
                                <div class="media-body">
                                    <h5 class="media-heading">{{ $comment->user->name }}</h5>
                                    <div class="content">{!! $comment->content !!}</div>
                                    <div class="timestamp">{{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <hr>
                        @endforeach
                        {{ $comments->links() }}
                    @else
                        <h5 class="no-comments">No comments yet.</h5>
                    @endif
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@endsection
